name: Twitter / X API
description: Twitter (now X) is a social media platform for posting short-form content called tweets. The v2 API lets you create and delete tweets, search recent tweets, retrieve user profiles, and list followers. Use this to automate social media posting, monitor conversations, or gather user data.

capabilities.name: create_tweet
capabilities.description: Post a new tweet to the authenticated user's timeline. Supports text content, polls, reply settings, and quote tweets.

capabilities.name: get_tweet
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single tweet by its ID, including metrics, author info, and media attachments.

capabilities.name: search_tweets
capabilities.description: Search recent tweets (last 7 days) using a query string with operators. Returns matching tweets with metadata.

capabilities.name: get_user
capabilities.description: Look up a Twitter user profile by username or user ID. Returns display name, bio, follower counts, and profile image.

capabilities.name: get_user_tweets
capabilities.description: Retrieve tweets posted by a specific user. Supports pagination and filtering by time range.

capabilities.name: delete_tweet
capabilities.description: Delete a tweet that was posted by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: get_user_followers
capabilities.description: List the followers of a specific user. Returns paginated user objects with profile information.
